name: live_non_transactional
description: One product, two live repos: per-repo `ar` then unreported `refcmd`, then reported product install (ipdcmd). No reboot.

name: dry_non_transactional
description: Dry-run: `ar` only per live repo (NO per-repo refcmd dry line), then the product install line.

name: product_insertion_order
description: Two REPAs (SLES then QA): product argv and ar order follow REPA/dict insertion order (SLES QA), not sorted (QA SLES).

name: all_dead_still_installs
description: All repo probes dead: no `ar`, no per-repo refcmd, but the product is still installed.

name: transactional_live
description: Transactional host: per-repo ar+refcmd, then REFTCMD before ipdtcmd (reported), then reboot; verify passes.

name: dry_transactional
description: Dry transactional: ar (no refcmd line), REFTCMD, ipdtcmd, then reboot (because !no_reboot).

name: dry_transactional_no_reboot
description: Dry transactional with --no-reboot: same as dry_transactional but no `systemctl reboot` dry line.

name: no_products
description: REPA resolves to no products: error, nothing run, worker fails.
